fastpyxl

  • Tutorial

Styling

  • Working with styles

Worksheets

  • Inserting and deleting rows and columns, moving ranges of cells

  • Worksheet Tables
  • Using filters and sorts
  • Print Settings
  • Pivot Tables
  • Comments
  • Dates and Times
  • Simple Formualae

  • Defined Names
  • Custom Document Properties
  • Protection

Charts

Images

  • Working with Images

Pandas

  • Working with Pandas and NumPy
